case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. ERNESTO BENITES MONTALVO

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $50.00) SERVED JUL-15-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MONTALVO, ERNESTO BENITES

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MONTALVO, ERNESTO BENITES $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,600.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MONTALVO, ERNESTO BENITES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-26-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-26-2019 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. REPRESENTED BY SOFIA REYES, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ERNESTO BENITES MONTALVO IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
